Now I have all the info. Let me collect the versions and resolve conflicts (highest wins):

| Package | Versions seen | Winner |
|---|---|---|
| System.Text.Json | 10.0.1, 8.0.4 | **10.0.1** |
| Azure.Identity | 1.13.2, 1.11.4 | **1.13.2** |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 | 8.0.1 |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 | 1.15.0 |
| xunit | 2.9.3 | 2.9.3 |

Creating `Directory.Packages.props` and stripping versions from all `.csproj` files:

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Azure.Identity" Version="1.13.2" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

data.reasoningText:
Now I have the full picture. Let me collect all packages and their versions across all projects:

| Package | Api | Worker | Shared | Tests |
|---------|-----|--------|--------|-------|
| System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 | 8.0.4 | 10.0.1 | 10.0.1 |
| Azure.Identity | 1.13.2 | - | 1.11.4 | - |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | - | 8.0.1 | - | - |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | - | 1.15.0 | - | - |


| xunit | - | - | - | 2.9.3 |

I've identified the version conflicts: System.Text.Json needs to be unified to 10.0.1 and Azure.Identity to 1.13.2. My plan is to create a centralized package management file with all these versions defined, then strip the version attributes from the individual project files.

data.content:
Done. Here's a summary of the conversion:

**Created** `Directory.Packages.props` with centralized versions:
- `Azure.Identity` → **1.13.2** (was 1.13.2 in Api, 1.11.4 in Shared)
- `Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting` → 8.0.1
- `OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting` → 1.15.0
- `System.Text.Json` → **10.0.1** (was 10.0.1 in Api/Shared/Tests, 8.0.4 in Worker)
- `xunit` → 2.9.3

**Updated** all 4 `.csproj` files — removed `Version` attributes from every `PackageReference`.

Two version conflicts were resolved by picking the highest: **System.Text.Json** (10.0.1 > 8.0.4) and **Azure.Identity** (1.13.2 > 1.11.4).
